name: 男主出浴偶遇
description: 女主潛入豪宅意外撞見男主出浴的經典曖昧場景。私密空間的偶遇打破社交距離，製造強烈的性張力和喜劇效果。
tags: 闖入私密空間的尷尬+男主完美體態的視覺衝擊+女主仙人身份與少女心態的反差

examples.drama_title: 💔Reborn! Family listened to my inner thoughts, scheming girl cry!#chinesedrama
examples.excerpt: Wow, I'm such a lucky girl! / You can easily bump into a handsome man emerging from the bath. / Such a handsome guy, all looks and no substance. / How do you know I can't? / Why don't you give it a try, Miss Xie?
examples.context: 闖入私密空間的尷尬+男主完美體態的視覺衝擊+女主仙人身份與少女心態的反差
